description: Organization-approved Terraform modules. When generating IaC, prefer these modules over raw resource blocks. Use the ModuleSource as the 'source' argument in module blocks.

TerraformModules.Description: Creates a VPC with standard subnet tiers (Web, App, Data, Mgmt, TgwAttach)
TerraformModules.BestPractices:
Always use private subnets for workloads.
Attach to Transit Gateway via TgwAttach subnets.
Enable VPC flow logs for audit compliance.
TerraformModules.SecurityNotes:
Do not create public subnets unless specifically approved.
Use NACLs for network segmentation between tiers.
VPC endpoints are mandatory for S3 and DynamoDB access.

TerraformModules.Description: Deploys an EKS cluster with managed node groups and IRSA
TerraformModules.BestPractices:
Use managed node groups for simplified patching.
Enable IRSA for pod-level IAM (never use node role for app permissions).
Deploy in private subnets only.
TerraformModules.SecurityNotes:
Restrict API server endpoint to private access.
Enable envelope encryption with KMS for secrets.
Use Calico or VPC CNI network policies.

TerraformModules.Description: Deploys an Aurora cluster (PostgreSQL or MySQL) with multi-AZ
TerraformModules.BestPractices:
Use Aurora PostgreSQL for new workloads (better performance/cost).
Enable Performance Insights for query analysis.
Set backup retention to minimum 7 days (35 for production).
TerraformModules.SecurityNotes:
Encryption at rest is mandatory (SCP enforced).
Place in Data-tier subnets only.
Use IAM database authentication when possible.
Never expose to public internet.

TerraformModules.Description: Creates an S3 bucket with encryption, versioning, and lifecycle policies
TerraformModules.BestPractices:
Enable versioning for all buckets containing application data.
Use lifecycle rules to transition old objects to Glacier.
Block all public access (enforced by SCP).
TerraformModules.SecurityNotes:
Server-side encryption is mandatory (SCP enforced).
Enforce HTTPS-only access via bucket policy.
Enable access logging for audit buckets.

TerraformModules.Description: Deploys a Lambda function with IAM role, CloudWatch logs, and VPC config
TerraformModules.BestPractices:
Use arm64 (Graviton) runtime for cost savings.
Set reserved concurrency for critical functions.
Use Lambda Powertools for structured logging.
TerraformModules.SecurityNotes:
Follow least-privilege for the execution role.
Never embed secrets in environment variables — use Secrets Manager.
Deploy in VPC only if accessing VPC resources.
